title: 🎉 NEW FAMILY WORKSHOP AT CREATORS LAB!
subtitle: 💡 Design Thinking with Your Teens!
description:
Ever wonder what your teen's day really feels like — or how to make life at home a little smoother (and more fun)? Join us for a hands-on workshop where parents and teens become designers of their own lives!

Together, you'll:
✨ Share your 'Day in the Life' stories
💬 Practice empathy and active listening
🧠 Brainstorm creative ways to make everyday moments better
🎨 Build quick prototypes to bring your ideas to life

This session is inspired by Stanford's d.school Design Thinking Starter Kit and designed for families who love to explore, create, and laugh together.

📅 Date: November 8th, 4-6pm
🍕 Free event with pizza and drinks!

title: 🚀 Build Like a Startup, Think Like a Creator!
subtitle: 💻 Hands-On AI Workshop at Mills High School
description:
Join us for an exciting free workshop at Mills High School! This special event is hosted by Mrs. Luna, the Computer Science teacher, and features Hugo (A junior at Mills) and Ashley (Our Program Director) leading a hands-on session on Vibe Coding and AI tools. Come and share your experience with AI and ChatGPT!

What you'll experience:
✨ Learn the fundamentals of Vibe Coding
🤖 Explore cutting-edge AI development tools
💡 Discover how AI can make you more productive
🎯 Discuss shortcomings of AI and what to watch out for

This workshop is designed for students and teachers who want to stay ahead of the curve in the rapidly evolving world of AI-powered development.

📅 Date: December 3rd during Flex
🏫 Location: Mills High School
🎓 Open to: Students and Teachers
🆓 Free Event
